name: Card Grid
description: Responsive grid of cards with configurable content. Supports product catalogs, recipe collections, feature showcases, and collection browsers via presets.

product.description: Product cards with image, title, price, CTA. For e-commerce catalogs.

slots.card-image: Product image in Card.Header with aspect ratio container
slots.card-body: Card.Body with product title (_heading6), description (_caption), price (_heading5)
slots.card-footer: Card.Footer with primary Button CTA and optional secondary action
slots.badge: Optional Badge overlay for sale/new/featured status

content.description: Content cards with cover image, metadata, tags, and author attribution. For recipe/article feeds.

slots.card-image: Cover photo with aspect ratio container and optional Badge overlay
slots.card-footer: Author Avatar + name link, optional count

collection.description: Collection cards with cover image, title, item count, and status badge. For browsing grouped content.

slots.card-image: Collection cover image with aspect ratio container
slots.card-badge: Badge showing public/private or other status

icon.description: Feature cards with icon, title, and description. For landing page capabilities.

slots.cards: Array of feature cards, each with icon circle, title (_heading5), and description (_caption _fgmuted)

resource.description: App/resource cards with status badge, metric chips (cpu/memory/machines/region), and click-to-navigate. For cloud platform app lists.

slots.card: Card per resource with name, status Badge, metric Chips, region tag
slots.metrics: Row of metric Chips showing cpu, memory, machines count

service.description: Service cards with large icon circle, description, status dot, and action button. For service catalogs and integrations.

slots.card: Card per service with icon circle, name, description, status dot, action Button

user.description: User cards with avatar, name, role badge, status indicator, and contact actions. Used for team directories and user management.

slots.card: Card per user with Avatar, name, role Badge, status indicator

slots.card-image: Card image with aspect ratio container
slots.card-body: Card.Body with title, description, and metadata
slots.card-footer: Card.Footer with CTA and optional secondary action
